creator: fbsd@www.zefox.net
text:
On:

FreeBSD www.zefox.com 11.0-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 11.0-PRERELEASE #7 r307003: Mon Oct 10 13:03:26 PDT 2016     bob@www.zefox.com:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/RPI2  arm

    0x30ba1a00: f64 = Register %vreg21

Target: armv6--freebsd11.0-gnueabihf
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /usr/bin
